package rulefixtures

import (
	"unsafe"
)

// scenario for unsafe_pointer_cast: `unsafe.Pointer` casts between incompatible types, particularly `uintptr` arithmetic followed by cast back to `unsafe.Pointer`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario743Positive(ptr unsafe.Pointer) unsafe.Pointer {
	addr := uintptr(ptr) + 8
	return unsafe.Pointer(addr)
}
